details: The agent executed appropriate API calls (searching PRs with failure status, then fetching check runs for each), found 5 distinct failed workflow runs with real run IDs (23386167213, 23386126565, 23386087640, 23385975707, 22788251012), provided specific failed job names for each run, and reported workflow names (with an appropriate transparency note that they were inferred since no direct workflow runs list endpoint was available). All 5 runs have distinct IDs, run-level detail, and job-level failure detail as required by the task.
